name: studiomeyer
description: StudioMeyer MCP Suite for Claude Code. Hosted SaaS plugins: Memory (53 tools, knowledge graph), CRM (33 tools, contacts + pipeline), GEO (23 tools, AI visibility across 8 LLMs), Crew (8 expert personas). Plus the Academy MCP (open source, 23 tools, lessons + recipes + tutor). All five include Claude Code v2.1.118 mcp_tool hook recipes for fully agentic workflows. Magic Link authentication. EU Frankfurt hosting. Free tiers available.

plugins.name: studiomeyer-memory
plugins.description: Hosted AI memory with 53 tools. Knowledge Graph, semantic search, contradiction detection, multi-agent namespaces, import from ChatGPT/Claude/Gemini/Copilot/Perplexity. Magic Link auth. Free tier (200 calls/day), Pro $29/mo, Team $49/mo. Includes 4 mcp_tool hook recipes (Stop, PreCompact, UserPromptSubmit, SubagentStop) for fully agentic memory.

plugins.name: studiomeyer-crm
plugins.description: Headless CRM as MCP server. 33 tools for contacts, companies, deals, pipeline, leads, follow-ups, notes, health scores, Stripe sync. Zero-Knowledge credential storage. Free (50 companies), Pro $29/mo, Team $49/mo. Includes 2 mcp_tool hook recipes (UserPromptSubmit auto-lookup, PostToolUse email-draft logger).

plugins.name: studiomeyer-geo
plugins.description: Generative Engine Optimization (GEO). 23 tools to measure and improve AI visibility across ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, Grok, DeepSeek, Meta AI, Copilot. Discovery stack audits, JSON-LD validation, schema generator. Free tier (19 tools without API keys). Includes 1 mcp_tool hook recipe (Stop with if-filter on *.md/*.mdx auto-audits visibility after content edits).

plugins.name: studiomeyer-crew
plugins.description: 8 expert agent personas (CEO, CFO, CMO, CTO, PM, Analyst, Creative Director, Support Lead) plus 3 multi-persona workflows. Zero extra API cost, runs inside your Claude subscription. Free. Includes 1 mcp_tool hook recipe (Stop auto-feedback) plus an optional bash SessionStart hook for cwd-aware persona-suggestion.

plugins.name: studiomeyer-academy
plugins.description: Memory-First AI Operator School. 23 tools — lessons, quiz, recipes, knowledge graph, certificates, AI tutor. Open Source MCP server (npm: mcp-academy, MIT). Free recipes (Phase 1-5), Pro €19/mo (all 16 phases incl. Hooks), Team €49/mo. Includes 2 mcp_tool hook recipes (SessionStart auto-stats + PostToolUse quiz cascade).
